events.title: Yogi Jayanti
events.time: Program times at the welcome desk
events.description: Join us to celebrate Yogi Jayanti with devotional programs at Edison Mandir.
events.longDescription: Celebrate Yogi Jayanti with satsang, darshan, and family programs across the mandir campus. All are welcome—check in at the welcome desk for today's schedule and hall locations.
events.qrHint: Scan for Telegram updates and program details

events.title: Sports Day — Balaks & Balikas
events.time: Morning program — time at welcome desk
events.description: A fun Sports Day for Balaks and Balikas. Wear comfortable clothes and bring your energy!
events.longDescription: Balaks and Balikas Sports Day includes team games, races, and group activities on the mandir grounds. Parents: please register interest so we can plan teams and refreshments. Athletic wear and water bottles recommended.
events.qrHint: Scan the interest form to sign up

events.title: Walkathon
events.time: Open to all — start time at welcome desk
events.description: Walkathon for everyone in the mandir community. All ages welcome.
events.longDescription: Join the mandir Walkathon—an all-ages community walk supporting wellness and seva. Register so we can share the route, meeting point, and any weather updates. Strollers and walking partners welcome.
events.qrHint: Scan to register for the Walkathon
